title: Database Management Systems
author: Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency
subject: database management systems, how they are used to address business problems, and
description: Databases play a significant role in everyday life, even if they are unnoticed. From organizing personal photos
prerequisites: handling of complex data types and relationships efficiently
learning_outcomes: Define data and differentiate between types of data
